name: Ennio Morricone
abstract: Ennio Morricone (10 November 1928 – 6 July 2020) was an Italian composer, orchestrator, conductor, trumpeter, and pianist who wrote music in a wide range of styles. With more than 400 scores for cinema and television, as well as more than 100 classical works, Morricone is widely considered one of the most prolific and greatest film compo…

about_quotes.evidence: Same thing with Ennio Morricone doing “Untouchables.” ... he would sometimes send her to the drum booth, you know, to tell me to have a fantasy
